mission.title: flux: HelmRelease valuesFrom kind secret with comma separated values (cannot end with ,)
mission.description: HelmRelease valuesFrom kind secret with comma separated values (cannot end with ,). This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify flux troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your flux deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review flux configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant flux configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux
kubectl get configmap -n flux -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flux
```
### Describe the bug

Hi,
in case that the secret value contains a comma character we receive the following error message:

```text
 helm-controller  unable to merge value from key 'brokers' in Secret 'default/kafka' into target path

steps.title: Apply the fix for HelmRelease valuesFrom kind secret with comma separated…
steps.description:
You need to escape the comma, as otherwise the parsing logic (which equals `--set` as `helm` itself has when `targetPath` is used) will trip over the value. See also: https://helm.sh/docs/intro/using_helm/#the-format-and-limitations-of---set

The correct value would be:
```yaml
brokers value:
```

steps.title: Confirm HelmRelease valuesFrom kind secret with comma… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flux -n flux --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n flux --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
You need to escape the comma, as otherwise the parsing logic (which equals `--set` as `helm` itself has when `targetPath` is used) will trip over the value. See also: https://helm.sh/docs/intro/using_helm/#the-format-and-limitations-of---set

The correct value would be: `kafka01.net:9092\,kafka02.net:9092\,kafka03.net:9092`

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with flux installed or the issue environment reproducible.
